first thing showed Pinterest board.
Susan...
I've attached link that addresses some copyright issues.
When person pins something onto their boards, Pinterest automatically links source.
There have been questions floating around since Pinterest's beginning about copyright law, far, none almost million users have been sued, general consensus that copyright falls under "fair use".
Also, websites block their content from being pinned.
think problem would arise presented pinned content your creation.
